title: 若駒ステークスの後に・三冠へ！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Trainer! How'd you like my performance out
there?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess I stood out a bit.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But the real race starts now! The Classics—the
path Prez dominated!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You said this was just a preliminary, right? So that
means next up must be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's what she's been waiting for—the first of the
Classics, where the top racers of a generation
prove their worth. Our next race is...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Finally! Just hearing it sets my heart on fire!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
When Prez won the Satsuki Sho, she pointed one
finger up as if to proclaim...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna do the same thing! I'm gonna be
Triple Crown champion too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish the Wakagoma Stakes without a hitch
and move on to our next challenge: the Classics!
